query:
SELECT ae.id, ae.worker_id, ae.event_type, ae.event_time, ae.method, ae.note, w.full_name as worker_name, w.code as worker_code
FROM attendance_events ae
JOIN workers w ON w.id = ae.worker_id
WHERE w.code = 'W01'
AND ae.event_time >= '2026-02-09 00:00:00'
AND ae.event_time <= '2026-02-11 23:59:59'
ORDER BY ae.event_time ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT ae.id, ae.worker_id, ae.event_type, ae.event_time, ae.method, ae.note, w.full_name as worker_name, w.code as worker_code
FROM attendance_events ae
JOIN workers w ON w.id = ae.worker_id
WHERE w.code = 'W01'
AND ae.event_time >= '2026-02-09 00:00:00'
AND ae.event_time <= '2026-02-11 23:59:59'
ORDER BY ae.event_time ASC;
